_scene_summary: Final confrontation on a dead moon. Two zones: barren moonscape (two-thirds) with surface sentries, then interior compound/facility (one-third) holding Q'narr. Crew in atmosphere suits. This is the climactic scene.
_tier1_bg_source: 5 Parsecs Core Rulebook/Art/png/General Art/Red Desert.png OR Jan_10_Desert_explo.png (both wasteland category, fit dead-moon vibe)
_tier1_alternative: If splitting two zones into separate scenes is desirable, future work: create story_event_07_surface.json + story_event_07_interior.json and route by mission phase

_tier2_planned_actors.intent: the facility entrance, mid-background, the goal
Q'narr silhouette in compound window, the final target
crew foreground in atmosphere suits, hero shot

_tier2_planned_fx.intent: starfield above moonscape - airless world, no atmosphere haze
compound windows glow - the only warm light in the scene

_animation_hints: Atmosphere particles: heavy moondust drift, low gravity feel
FX compound_lights modulate breathe - life inside the dead world
Q'narr silhouette modulate pulse - menacing presence
Ken Burns slow zoom toward compound entrance - building inevitability
This is THE climactic scene - allocate the most animation polish here
